user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Glossier
Product type: Cloud Paint blush
Tone: fresh, approachable, youthful
Visual style: Soft, airy visuals with pastel hues and natural lighting that emphasize a dewy, effortless beauty look.
Conceptual technique: authentic user-generated content showcasing real people in everyday moments
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Soft, airy visuals with pastel hues and natural lighting that emphasize a dewy, effortless beauty look.
brief.conceptual_technique: Authentic user-generated content showcasing real people in everyday moments
brief.headline: Glow Naturally, Every Day
brief.tagline: Cloud Paint by Glossier – Blush that feels like you
brief.copy: Meet Cloud Paint: a gel-cream blush that blends seamlessly for a fresh, dewy flush. No filters, just your natural glow.

visual_direction.image_content: Candid, close-up shots of diverse real people applying Cloud Paint in natural light — at home, at a café, or outdoors. The blush is subtly visible, enhancing their natural complexion with a soft flush in pastel hues.
visual_direction.color_palette: Soft pinks, peaches, and corals with airy whites and light pastels.
visual_direction.lighting: Natural, diffused light creating a gentle, glowing effect on skin.
visual_direction.composition: Unpolished yet beautiful moments that feel spontaneous and relatable, with minimal styling to keep the focus on authentic beauty.
visual_direction.background: Simple, uncluttered environments like a sunlit bedroom, kitchen, or park.
